description: World Cup history for all 48 teams in the 2026 FIFA World Cup

iconicMoments.description: Hosted the World Cup and reached the quarter-finals, losing to Italy 4-1 in a classic match
Hosted again and reached the quarter-finals; Maradona's 'Hand of God' eliminated them vs Argentina
Guillermo Ochoa's legendary saves vs Brazil in a 0-0 group stage draw
Hosted the first World Cup on African soil; Siphiwe Tshabalala's stunning opening goal vs Mexico
First ever World Cup appearance after end of apartheid; beat France 2-1 in final group game (France already qualified)
Co-hosted and reached the semi-finals, beating Spain and Italy en route — the greatest Asian World Cup run ever
Stunned defending champions Germany 2-0 in the group stage, eliminating them
Late Hwang Hee-chan goal vs Portugal sealed dramatic Round of 16 qualification
Debut World Cup saw 'Danish Dynamite' play thrilling attacking football, beating Uruguay 6-1
Beat Nigeria 4-1 in the Round of 16 to reach the quarter-finals
Arrived as Euro 2020 semi-finalists but exited in the group stage
Hosted the World Cup and reached the quarter-finals; the tournament of the 'Miracle of Bern'
Became the first team eliminated from a World Cup without conceding a goal (lost on penalties to Ukraine)
Beat reigning Euro champions Italy in World Cup qualifying, denying them a spot
First and only World Cup appearance for 36 years; failed to score in three group games
Returned after 36-year absence; Alphonso Davies scored Canada's first-ever World Cup goal vs Croatia
Hosted the first Middle Eastern World Cup; became the first host nation to lose the opening game
Paolo Rossi's hat-trick vs Brazil in one of the greatest World Cup games ever; went on to win the title
Won the World Cup in Germany; Zidane's headbutt on Materazzi in the final became iconic
The 'Game of the Century' semi-final vs West Germany, winning 4-3
Became the first African and Arab nation to reach a World Cup semi-final, beating Belgium, Spain, and Portugal
First African team to top a World Cup group, finishing ahead of England, Poland, and Portugal
Pelé and the greatest team ever assembled won in Mexico; the 4-1 final vs Italy is considered the perfect performance
Ronaldo's redemption — scored both goals in the final vs Germany after the mysterious 1998 final seizure
Host nation humiliated 7-1 by Germany in the semi-final in Belo Horizonte — the 'Mineirazo'
Archie Gemmill's legendary solo goal vs the Netherlands — one of the greatest World Cup goals ever scored
Opening match of France 98 vs Brazil; Tom Boyd's own goal in a 2-1 loss
Emmanuel Sanon scored against Italy's Dino Zoff, ending his record 1,142-minute unbeaten streak
Stunned England 1-0 in one of the greatest World Cup upsets of all time
Beat Mexico 2-0 to reach the quarter-finals; Landon Donovan emerged as a star
Christian Pulisic's goal vs Iran sent the US through; he was hospitalized after scoring
Reached their first quarter-final; Oscar Cardozo's penalty miss vs Spain ended their dream
José Luis Chilavert's goalkeeping heroics helped them reach the Round of 16
John Aloisi's penalty in the playoff vs Uruguay ended a 32-year World Cup drought
Tim Cahill scored the Socceroos' first-ever World Cup goal; reached the Round of 16
Beat Denmark to reach the knockout stage for only the second time
Stunning third-place finish in their second World Cup; Hakan Şükür scored the fastest World Cup goal ever (10.8 seconds) in the third-place match
First World Cup appearance; lost 7-0 to West Germany in the group stage
The 'Miracle of Bern' — beat the mighty Hungarians 3-2 in the final as heavy underdogs
Demolished Brazil 7-1 in the semi-final and won the title with Götze's extra-time final goal vs Argentina
Reunification tournament; Andreas Brehme's penalty won the final vs Argentina
Didier Drogba led the 'Golden Generation' to their first World Cup; drew with Argentina
Beat Japan 2-1 with a late Gervinho goal in a dramatic group game
Beat Poland and Costa Rica to reach the Round of 16 in their second World Cup
Enner Valencia scored in the opening match vs Qatar; Ecuador won 2-0
Historic qualification as the smallest Caribbean nation to reach a World Cup; population of ~150,000
Johan Cruyff and Total Football revolutionized the game; lost the final to West Germany
Dennis Bergkamp's last-minute goal vs Argentina — one of the greatest World Cup goals ever
Reached the final in South Africa; lost to Spain in extra time
Shocked Germany 2-1 and Spain 2-1 in the group stage to top the 'Group of Death'
Co-hosts reached the Round of 16; electrifying atmosphere across the nation
Led Belgium 2-0 in the Round of 16 before losing 3-2 in a heartbreaking comeback
First African nation to win a World Cup match, beating Mexico 3-1
Beat France 1-0 in the group stage but still failed to advance
Reached the quarter-finals on debut; Andriy Shevchenko led the squad but lost to Italy
Eusébio scored 9 goals including 4 in a legendary comeback vs North Korea from 3-0 down
Cristiano Ronaldo's final World Cup; lost to Morocco in the quarter-finals
Reached the semi-finals; Ronaldo emerged as a global star
Beat the USA 2-1 in a politically charged group-stage match in Lyon
Nearly beat Portugal in the group stage; a late VAR penalty denied them advancement
Beat Wales 2-0 with two injury-time goals in a dramatic group match
Golden Generation reached the semi-finals; Nacer Chadli's counter-attack goal eliminated Japan in a 3-2 classic
Reached the semi-finals in Mexico; lost to Maradona's Argentina
Reached the quarter-finals with a talented young squad featuring Hazard, De Bruyne, and Lukaku
First African nation to play in a World Cup
Mohamed Salah returned from injury to score vs Saudi Arabia; first World Cup in 28 years
Won the World Cup for the first time; Iniesta's extra-time goal in the final vs Netherlands — the peak of tiki-taka
Set a World Cup record with 1,058 completed passes in a 7-0 demolition of Costa Rica
Reached the final group stage (top 4) in their best early tournament showing
Historic first World Cup qualification for the island nation of ~600,000 people
Saeed Al-Owairan's solo goal vs Belgium — dribbling past five players — became one of the tournament's greatest goals
Stunned Argentina 2-1 in one of the biggest World Cup upsets in history; Saudi Arabia declared a national holiday

serbia.name: Serbia

iconicMoments.description: Dramatic 3-3 draw vs Cameroon in one of the most entertaining group games
Beat Costa Rica 1-0 with a stunning Kolarov free kick

serbia.note: As independent Serbia since 2006; Yugoslavia/Serbia & Montenegro had reached the semi-finals (1930, 1962)

iconicMoments.description: Zidane's two headers in the final vs Brazil; the host nation won the World Cup for the first time
Won in Russia with a young, talented squad; Mbappé became the youngest scorer in a final since Pelé
Mbappé's hat-trick in the final vs Argentina wasn't enough; lost on penalties in one of the greatest finals ever
Shocked defending champions France 1-0 in the opening match on debut; reached the quarter-finals
Won their first-ever knockout round match at a World Cup, beating Ecuador
Beat Brazil 2-1 in the group stage; reached the Round of 16
Lost to Italy 2-1 in extra time in the first round
Maradona's 'Hand of God' and 'Goal of the Century' vs England in the same quarter-final match
Messi finally won the World Cup; the final vs France is widely considered the greatest World Cup final ever
Won the World Cup as hosts; Mario Kempes scored twice in the final
Beat West Germany 2-1 in a famous upset; later denied advancement by the 'Disgrace of Gijón' collusion
Reached the Round of 16 for the first time; pushed Germany to extra time before losing 2-1
Finished third in Switzerland; part of the highest-scoring World Cup match ever (Austria 7-5 Switzerland)
Beat West Germany in the group stage — the 'Miracle of Córdoba'
Part of the infamous 'Disgrace of Gijón' result vs West Germany
Reached the Asian Cup final for the first time, signaling their rise as a regional power
Historic first World Cup qualification
James Rodríguez won the Golden Boot with 6 goals; his volley vs Uruguay is an all-time great World Cup goal
Andrés Escobar's own goal vs USA led to tragedy; he was murdered after returning home
René Higuita's eccentric goalkeeping and Colombia's flair announced them on the world stage
38-year-old Roger Milla's goals and corner-flag dance; the 'Indomitable Lions' reached the quarter-finals, inspiring a continent
Unbeaten in the group stage but eliminated on goal difference in their World Cup debut
Vincent Aboubakar's stoppage-time winner beat Brazil but wasn't enough to advance
Historic first World Cup qualification — Central Asia's first representative at a World Cup since independence
Won the World Cup at Wembley; Geoff Hurst's hat-trick in the final and 'They think it's all over' commentary
Reached the semi-finals for the first time since 1990; Harry Kane won the Golden Boot
Gary Lineker won the Golden Boot but Maradona's genius eliminated them in the quarter-finals
Asamoah Gyan's penalty miss after Suárez's handball on the line; nearly became the first African semi-finalist
First World Cup appearance; Asamoah Gyan scored with a last-minute penalty vs Czech Republic
Third place on debut; Davor Šuker won the Golden Boot with 6 goals
Reached the final for the first time; Mandžukić's own goal in the final and Modrić's Golden Ball
Third place again; beaten semi-finalists in back-to-back tournaments — remarkable for a nation of 4 million
Felipe Baloy scored Panama's first-ever World Cup goal vs England; tears of joy across the nation
Qualifying goal vs Costa Rica sparked a national holiday; commentator's emotional call became viral
